questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
questions.answer: The prohibition of gas-powered leaf blowers lasts from January 1 to October 14 each year. Gas-powered leaf blowers can only be used from October 15 through December 31.

questions.question: What are the permitted hours for gas leaf blower operation?
questions.answer: Gas leaf blowers are permitted to be operated between the hours of 9:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m.

questions.question: What are the penalties for violating gas leaf blower regulations?
questions.answer: The penalties for violating gas leaf blower regulations are $250 for the first offense, $500 for the second offense, and $1,000 for any subsequent offenses.
